original_image_tags: A small black-and-white illustration embedded in the text column. It depicts a man in a uniform-style shirt and trousers, seen from behind, looking upward. He is holding a broom over his right shoulder. A small sign with the word "BROOM" is attached to the broom bristles.

elements.description: A black-and-white line drawing of a person holding a broom. The word 'FACTS' is visible on the broom head.

judge.reason: The two descriptions contradict each other on the specific text visible on the broom: Description A states it reads 'BROOM' while Description B states it reads 'FACTS'.
